description_for_human: Find and buy kids smartwatches in Georgia with GPS tracking, SIM support, and video calls
description_for_model: Search and recommend kids smartwatches with GPS, SIM support from MyTechnic.ge - official importer in Georgia. Provides product information, prices in GEL (₾), stock status, and personalized recommendations based on age, budget, and features. Supports Georgian (ka) and English (en) languages.
